creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like it needs:
  LDADD+= -lpthread
after the .endif in its Makefile.  I think it has to be added there so that it is at the end of the list of libraries since since the fix to /usr/share/mk/bsd.libnames.mk to enforce the ordering of -lpthread and -lc is not present.
